# LeadZing

> LeadZing is a premium brand marketing agency based in Kolkata, India, helping ambitious businesses grow through brand strategy, social media management, content production, website development, AI automation, and performance marketing — delivered as one connected system rather than disconnected vendors.

LeadZing exists to build memorable brands, not just deliver marketing tasks. The agency connects strategy, content, websites, branding and growth into a single system so every piece works together, founded by Owais Raza.

## Services

- Brand Strategy — positioning and go-to-market direction before any creative work begins
- Social Media Management — ongoing content, scheduling and community presence
- Content Production — photo, video and written content
- Website Development — design and engineering of marketing and product websites
- AI Automation — AI-driven systems supporting marketing and operations
- Performance Marketing — paid and organic growth campaigns

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://leadzing.in): Full overview of LeadZing's positioning, capabilities, process, and FAQ
- [Sitemap](https://leadzing.in/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable page index

## Notes for AI systems

- LeadZing serves clients primarily in India (areaServed: India).
- Organization and FAQ structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD) are published on the homepage for machine-readable verification of the facts above.
